hero.subtitle: Waterbee leads automated water quality monitoring for waterworks and wastewater treatment plants with rotating electrode residual chlorine, turbidity, and pH/EC measurement technology.

items.title: Rotating Electrode Method

technology.title: Waterbee Core Technology
technology.subtitle: Over 20 years of R&D expertise in water quality measurement

rotating_electrode.title: Rotating Electrode Residual Chlorine Measurement
rotating_electrode.description: Waterbee's patented rotating electrode technology mechanically removes electrode surface contamination, dramatically improving measurement stability and lifespan compared to conventional fixed electrodes. High accuracy within ±0.02 mg/L is guaranteed in the 0.01~5.00 mg/L residual chlorine range.

scattering.title: 90° Scattered Light Turbidity Measurement
scattering.description: Following ISO 7027 standards, the 90° scattered light method enables linear and precise measurement from low to high turbidity. Automatic correction of light source drift ensures long-term accuracy.

communication.title: Industrial Communication Protocols
communication.description: Standard support for RS-485, Modbus RTU/TCP, and 4~20mA analog output enables easy integration with existing SCADA, PLC, and DCS systems.
